meta.poznamky: right má hodnotu 0 (špatně). Student musí změnit na 36 (360/10).

cms.task_text: Kód kreslí pravidelný desetiúhelník, ale [hlp]úhel otočení je nulový[/hlp]. Pro desetiúhelník je správný úhel [hlp]36°[/hlp] (360 ÷ 10).
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">10</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">50</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">0</field></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">10</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">50</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">36</field></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
